1._: Cyrus comes in out of the rain with the road still on him, shakes the wet from his cloak, and takes the room the way he takes every room — exits first, then the company. The broad keeper behind the bar gives him a nod and a name: Bram. He sets his back to a wall, his sword on the settle by custom, and waits to see what kind of house this is.

content._: Cyrus's account at the Beaten Drum, beat by beat — the private narrative, names as known.
